stem: How does a new buyer usually find your inventory?
clarifier: The route from "never heard of you" to "show me what you've got."
options: Word of mouth or cold outreach — they have to know us first
We share a PDF rate card or site list when asked
Our website has a searchable site finder or map
We're listed on one or more programmatic marketplaces
Buyers can find, filter, and check live availability across multiple exchanges

stem: From "I want to book" to "it's confirmed," how long does it typically take?
options: Two weeks+ — RFP, negotiation, IO, sign-off
About a week — mostly email back-and-forth
A few days — templated quotes, faster sign-off
Same day — buyers can hold inventory and confirm in hours
Minutes — fully self-serve, programmatic guaranteed or PMP

stem: What do you give buyers as proof the campaign ran?
options: Play logs plus an audience estimate from our own methodology
Impressions plus audience composition (demographics, mobility, etc.)
Full attribution — impressions, audience, and outcomes tied to buyer KPIs
